data.title: SOL will unlock a large amount of funds on March 1, and VCs will have unrealized profits of hundreds of millions of dollars
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: There is still one week left before Solana's largest token unlocking in history (worth $2 billion), and 11.2 million SOL will be unlocked and circulated on March 1. Token unlocking may bring huge selling pressure to Solana, because a large part of the locked tokens were purchased at a discount at the FTX auction compared to today's price.
Crypto analyst Artchick.eth said that more than 15 million SOL (about $2.5 billion) will enter circulation in the next three months, most of which will be purchased by institutions such as Galaxy Digital, Pantera Capital and Figure at $64 per SOL through the FTX auction. Galaxy still has a huge profit on the SOL purchased at $64.
Similarly, cryptocurrency trader RunnerXBT mentioned that now is a "dangerous" time to buy Solana, and emphasized that once SOL is unlocked, Galaxy Digital, Pantera and Figure will receive unrealized profits of $3 billion, $1 billion and $150 million respectively. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Influenced by the news of YZi Labs’ participation in the investment, VANA briefly reached 8 USDT.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News OKX market shows that VANA briefly hit 8 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 22.55%. This may be affected by the news that "YZi Labs invested in Vana in January, and CZ will serve as a consultant."

data.title: YZi Labs Invests in Crypto-AI Startup Vana, CZ Joins as Advisor
data.description: Investment Strengthens AI and Blockchain SynergyYZi Labs, formerly known as Binance Labs, has made a strategic investment in Vana, a crypto-AI startup focused on data ownership and decentralization. As part of the deal, Binance co-founder Changpeng "CZ" Zhao has joined Vana as an advisor, reinforcing his continued presence in the Web3 and AI sectors.The investment, which closed in January 2025, marks YZi Labs' first AI-focused investment since its rebranding last month. Vana co-founder Anna Kazlauskas confirmed that YZi Labs is the sole investor in this round, though she declined to disclose the financial details or valuation changes.Vana’s Vision: Decentralized AI and Data OwnershipFounded in 2021, Vana aims to revolutionize AI by enabling users to own and monetize their data. Its Layer 1 blockchain allows contributors to pool data into Data DAOs (Decentralized Autonomous Organizations), where they can earn rewards and retain ownership over AI models trained with their data.“Data DAOs are central to Vana’s mission of user-owned AI,” Kazlauskas explained. “They give users control over their data, allowing for aggregation around specific use cases that can then be monetized for AI development.”Vana launched its mainnet and token in December 2024, with VANA currently trading at $6.25, down 82% since launch. Despite this, the project holds a market cap of $192 million and a fully diluted valuation of $747 million, according to The Block.

data.title: YZi Labs invested in crypto AI startup Vana in January, and CZ joined as an advisor
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News YZi Labs invested an undisclosed amount in crypto AI startup Vana, and CZ joined as an advisor. YZi Labs said on Monday that as part of the investment, Binance co-founder Changpeng Zhao (CZ" Zhao) has joined Vana as an advisor. He has recently played an active role in YZi Labs after YZi Labs changed its name from Binance Labs. Vana co-founder Anna Kazlauskas said this is a strategic investment completed in January 2025. (the block)

data.title: Agricultural blockchain project EthicHub completes $1 million in financing, Bybit participates in the investment
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Agricultural blockchain project EthicHub has completed a $1 million financing, with Bybit participating in the investment. The investment was facilitated by the Blockchain Goodwill Alliance (BGA). EthicHub mainly uses blockchain to promote financial inclusion and empower small farmers, changing agricultural finance by integrating productive loans, mixed financing and market access. (MarketWatch)

data.description: On Feb 24, 2025, 14:51 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 95,000 USDT and is now trading at 94,930.398438 USDT, with a narrowed 0.87% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Bloomberg ETF Analyst Eric Balchunas Clarifies No Meme Coin Launch
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Eric Balchunas, senior ETF analyst at Bloomberg, clarified on the X platform that it neither launched Meme coin nor supported Meme coin, and Meme coin was not his cup of tea.
